ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of character (e.g., warrior, mage) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player controlling the character */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the character */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Total experience points of the character */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Current health points of the character */,
  "max_health" INTEGER /* Maximum health points of the character */,
  "mana" INTEGER /* Current mana points of the character */,
  "max_mana" INTEGER /* Maximum mana points of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength attribute of the character */,
  "dexterity" INTEGER /* Dexterity attribute of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence attribute of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the character was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the character was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the player last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shards" (
  "shard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shard */,
  "shard_name" TEXT /* Name of the shard */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of shard (e.g., familiar, equipment) */,
  "mp_cost" REAL /* MP cost of the shard */,
  "atk" INTEGER /* ATK value of the shard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the shard */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the shard */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the shard when equipped */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shard was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "familiars" (
  "familiar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each familiar */,
  "familiar_name" TEXT /* Name of the familiar */,
  "shard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shard associated with the familiar */,
  "demon" TEXT /* Demon associated with the familiar */,
  "enhancement" TEXT /* Enhancement details of the familiar */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the familiar */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the familiar */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the familiar when equipped */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the familiar was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the familiar was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("familiar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "shard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shard associated with the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., sword, armor) */,
  "stats" TEXT /* Stats of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the equipment */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the equipment */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the equipment when equipped */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the equipment was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the equipment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enhancements" (
  "enhancement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enhancement */,
  "enhancement_name" TEXT /* Name of the enhancement */,
  "shard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shard associated with the enhancement */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the enhancement */,
  "stats" TEXT /* Stats of the enhancement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the enhancement */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the enhancement when applied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the enhancement was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the enhancement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enhancement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enhancements_shard_id FOREIGN KEY ("shard_id") REFERENCES shard_enhancements ("shard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_shards" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "shard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shard */,
  "equip_date" TEXT /* Date the shard was equipped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shard (e.g., equipped, unequipped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "shard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_equipment" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "equip_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was equipped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., equipped, unequipped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shard_enhancements" (
  "shard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shard */,
  "enhancement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enhancement */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the enhancement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enhancement (e.g., applied, not applied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shard_id", "enhancement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., action, error, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the admin account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the admin last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the administrator (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module to which the permission applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_message" TEXT /* Message of the update */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)
